description: standalone raw MAISI-space CT mask generation from controllable anatomy-size conditions (GPU mask diffusion); diagnostic, not paired CT
rules: thin wrapper: invokes upstream scripts.sample_mask.ldm_conditional_sample_one_mask — do not reimplement mask diffusion
narrow diagnostic mode: produces raw MAISI label masks (e.g. checking lung tumor -> label 23) before image generation, not paired CT image synthesis
restricted to native 256x256x256 at 1.5 mm isotropic; mask_generation_num_inference_steps must be 1000 for the DDPM mask generator; use the generate perk for resampled paired image/mask output

REQUEST_JSON must supply a non-empty controllable_anatomy_size ([name, size] pairs, <=10, at most one tumor, size in [0,1] or -1); allowed keys are num_output_samples, controllable_anatomy_size, output_size, spacing, mask_generation_num_inference_steps, autoencoder_sliding_window_infer_size/overlap
PREFLIGHT=1 (default) validates the request + weights/dataset/CUDA presence and exits without sampling; set PREFLIGHT=0 and CONFIRM=1 to actually generate masks (GPU-gated)
outputs result.json plus mask_*.nii.gz under record_store; the upstream clone is never mutated
needs the full CT download (mask-generation weights + datasets/all_anatomy_size_conditions.json), CUDA, and an NVIDIA GPU — there is no CPU fallback
usage: Set REQUEST_JSON (mask request override path or 'default') and NV_GENERATE_ROOT. Default run is a preflight validation report; pass PREFLIGHT=0 CONFIRM=1 to sample. Output: result.json with the generated mask label sets and expected MAISI label mapping.
limitation: Thin wrapper — do not modify code under NV_GENERATE_ROOT. Mask generation is GPU-heavy and gated behind explicit confirmation. Output is synthetic and NOT clinically meaningful. Not for clinical deployment, interpretation, autonomous diagnosis, or regulatory submission.
